## Safety Review

- [ ] No secrets, private data, local paths, generated caches, or logs
- [ ] No unreviewed scripts, package execution, MCP scopes, or install changes
- [ ] High-risk actions stay draft-first, read-first, or approval-gated
- [ ] Host-specific behavior stays in setup docs, templates, or adapter scripts
